interface.name: PS_P_ManagementDashboard
interface.definition:
#"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_headerContentLayout"( header: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_billboardLayout_v1"( backgroundColor: "#030A4D", height: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "MEDIUM", "SHORT_PLUS" ), marginBelow: "NONE", overlay: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_fullOverlay"( alignVertical: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "TOP", "MIDDLE" ), contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "Meine JVA ", #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "Fuhlsbüttel " }, style: { "STRONG" } ) }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "MEDIUM", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: year(today()), color: "#47b311", size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "MEDIUM", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), char(10) }, align: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "CENTER", "LEFT" ), marginBelow: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "STANDARD", "NONE" ) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "2021 ACTUAL IMPACT" }, size: "SMALL", style: { "STRONG" } ) }, showWhen: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), align: "CENTER", marginBelow: "NONE" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "______________________________" }, size: "SMALL" ), "____________________________________" }, color: "#93c47d" ) }, showWhen: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), marginBelow: "MORE" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideLayout"( items: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideItem"( item: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: concat( "KW ", weeknum(today()), " Vorfälle" ), labelPosition: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "COLLAPSED", "ABOVE" ), value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextIcon"(icon: "exclamation-circle") }, color: "#3a77e9", size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { tointeger(30 + rand() * 50) }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), }, color: "#ffffff" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, color: "SECONDARY", size: "LARGE" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextIcon"( icon: "arrow-circle-up-alt", size: "MEDIUM_PLUS", color: "NEGATIVE" ) }, align: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "CENTER", "LEFT" ), marginBelow: if(#"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "LESS", "NONE") ), width: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "AUTO", "MINIMIZE" ) ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", spacing: "SPARSE" ) }, width: "AUTO" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideLayout"( items: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideItem"( item: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "Personal", labelPosition: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "COLLAPSED", "ABOVE" ), value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextIcon"(icon: "users") }, color: "#3a77e9", size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "83 | 34 | 7" }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), }, color: "#ffffff" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, color: "SECONDARY", size: "LARGE" ) }, align: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "CENTER", "LEFT" ), marginBelow: if(#"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "LESS", "NONE") ), width: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "AUTO", "MINIMIZE" ) ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", spacing: "SPARSE" ) }, width: "AUTO" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "Rückfallquote" }, size: "SMALL", style: { "STRONG" } ) }, showWhen: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), align: "CENTER", marginBelow: "NONE" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideLayout"( items: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideItem"( item: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( label: "Rückfallquote", labelPosition: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "COLLAPSED", "ABOVE" ), value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextIcon"(icon: "landmark") }, color: "#3a77e9", size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "13 %" }, size: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "DESKTOP_NARROW", "DESKTOP", "DESKTOP_WIDE" } ), "LARGE_PLUS", "MEDIUM_PLUS" ), style: { "STRONG" } ), }, color: "#ffffff" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, color: "SECONDARY", size: "LARGE" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextIcon"( icon: "arrow-circle-down-alt", size: "MEDIUM_PLUS", color: "POSITIVE" ) }, align: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "CENTER", "LEFT" ), marginBelow: "NONE" ), width: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), "AUTO", "MINIMIZE" ) ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", spacing: "SPARSE" ) }, width: "AUTO" ) }, marginAbove: "NONE", stackWhen: { "PHONE" }, showDividers: if(#"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "PHONE" }), false, true) ) }, width: "WIDE_PLUS" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: {}, width: "MEDIUM_PLUS", showWhen: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"({ "DESKTOP_WIDE" }) ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", stackWhen: { "PHONE", "TABLET_PORTRAIT", "TABLET_LANDSCAPE" } ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( width: "NARROW_PLUS", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_imageField_v1"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", align: "END", size: "FIT", images: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"_a-0000ed87-2144-8000-9bee-011c48011c48_1076413" ) ) } ) } ) }, style: "NONE" ) ), }, contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { /* Belegung und Kapazität: Anzahl der Insassen im Vergleich zur Gesamtkapazität. Belegungsrate pro Abteilung oder Zellenblock. */ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: "Belegung und Kapazität", labelHeadingTag: "H2", labelColor: "STANDARD", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { "765 / 800 Haftplätze" }, size: "LARGE", style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, color: "SECONDARY", size: "LARGE" ) }, marginAbove: "STANDARD", marginBelow: "NONE" ), }, width: "NARROW" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_progressBarField"( label: "", labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", percentage: 100 / 800 * 765, color: "#3a77e9", style: "THICK", marginAbove: "LESS", marginBelow: "LESS", showPercentage: true ) }, width: "AUTO" ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", stackWhen: { "TABLET_LANDSCAPE", "DESKTOP_NARROW" } ) }, link: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_dynamicLink"(), height: "SHORT_PLUS", style: "NONE", marginBelow: "STANDARD", showBorder: false, showShadow: true, shape: "ROUNDED" ) } ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { /* Finanzdaten: Budgetausgaben und -einnahmen. Kosten pro Insasse.
*/ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: "Finanzdaten", labelHeadingTag: "H2", labelColor: "STANDARD", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideLayout"( items: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sideBySideItem"( item: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextDisplayField"( labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", value: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { #"urn:appian:function:v1:a:currency"( isoCode: "EUR", value: 8500000 ) }, size: "LARGE", style: { "STRONG" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_richTextItem_v1"( text: { " " }, color: "SECONDARY", size: "LARGE" ) }, marginAbove: "STANDARD", marginBelow: "NONE" ), width: "MINIMIZE" ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", marginBelow: "EVEN_LESS" ), }, width: "NARROW" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_progressBarField"( label: "", labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", percentage: 27, color: "NEGATIVE", style: "THICK", marginAbove: "LESS", marginBelow: "LESS", showPercentage: true ) }, width: "AUTO" ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", stackWhen: { "TABLET_LANDSCAPE", "DESKTOP_NARROW" } ) }, height: "SHORT_PLUS", style: "NONE", marginBelow: "STANDARD", showBorder: false, showShadow: true, shape: "ROUNDED" ) } ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { /* Gesundheitsdaten: Anzahl der Insassen mit gesundheitlichen Problemen. Verfügbarkeit und Nutzung von medizinischen Ressourcen. */ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: "Gesundheitsdaten", labelHeadingTag: "H2", labelColor: "STANDARD", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( height: "SHORT_PLUS", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( marginBelow: "NONE", columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gaugeField"( size: "SMALL", percentage: 7, primaryText: "7 %", label: "Krankenstand Insassen", color: "POSITIVE", marginBelow: "NONE", ) }, width: "NARROW" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_gaugeField"( size: "SMALL", percentage: 71, primaryText: "71 %", label: "Auslastung Krankenstation", color: "WARN", marginBelow: "NONE", ) }, width: "AUTO" ) }, alignVertical: "MIDDLE", stackWhen: { "TABLET_LANDSCAPE", "DESKTOP_NARROW" } ) }, style: "NONE", marginBelow: "STANDARD", showBorder: false, showShadow: true, shape: "ROUNDED" ) } ) } ) }, stackWhen: { "PHONE", "TABLET_PORTRAIT" } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnsLayout"( columns: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { /* Sicherheitsdaten: Anzahl und Art der Sicherheitsvorfälle (z.B. Fluchtversuche, Gewaltvorfälle). Status der Sicherheitsausrüstung (z.B. Kameras, Alarmsysteme). */ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: "Sicherheitsdaten", labelHeadingTag: "H2", labelColor: "STANDARD", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_areaChartField"( label: "", labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", categories: reverse(text(edate(today(), - enumerate(18)), "mmm")), series: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"( label: "Leichte Vorfälle", data: tointeger(7 + rand(18) * 12) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"( label: "Schwere Vorfälle", data: tointeger(5 + rand(18) * 2) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"( label: "Ausfälle Sicherheit", data: tointeger(rand(18) * 3) ), }, xAxisTitle: "", yAxisTitle: "", stacking: "NONE", showLegend: true, showTooltips: true, colorScheme: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_colorSchemeCustom"( colors: { "#59C968", "#41934B", "#117D20", "#0A4A13" } ), height: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "PHONE", "TABLET_PORTRAIT", "TABLET_LANDSCAPE", "DESKTOP_NARROW" } ), "SHORT", "MEDIUM" ), xAxisStyle: "STANDARD", yAxisStyle: "STANDARD" ) }, height: "AUTO", style: "NONE", marginBelow: "STANDARD", showBorder: false, showShadow: true, shape: "ROUNDED" ) } ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { /* Besucherstatistiken: Anzahl der Besuche und Besucher. Besuchszeiten und -häufigkeit. */ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: "Besucherstatistiken " & text(today(), "mmmm"), labelHeadingTag: "H2", labelColor: "STANDARD", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_lineChartField_v1"( label: "", labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", categories: reverse(text(today() - enumerate(day(today())), "d")), series: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"( label: "Besucher", data: tointeger(50 + rand(day(today())) * 30) ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"( label: "Vorfälle", data: tointeger(1 + rand(day(today())) * 2) ), }, xAxisTitle: "", yAxisTitle: "", showLegend: true, showTooltips: true, colorScheme: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_colorSchemeCustom"( colors: { "#59C968", "#41934B", "#117D20", "#0A4A13" } ), height: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "PHONE", "TABLET_PORTRAIT", "TABLET_LANDSCAPE", "DESKTOP_NARROW" } ), "SHORT", "MEDIUM" ), xAxisStyle: "STANDARD", yAxisStyle: "STANDARD" ) }, height: "AUTO", style: "NONE", marginBelow: "STANDARD", showBorder: false, showShadow: true, shape: "ROUNDED" ) } ) } ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnLayout"( contents: { /* Rehabilitationsprogramme: Teilnahme und Fortschritt der Insassen in verschiedenen Programmen. Erfolgsraten und Rückfallquoten. */ #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_sectionLayout_v1"( label: "Rehabilitationsprogramme", labelHeadingTag: "H2", labelColor: "STANDARD", contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_cardLayout"( contents: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_columnChartField"( label: "", labelPosition: "COLLAPSED", categories: { "Psychosoziale Betreuung", "Beziehungsarbeit", "Suchttherapie", "Soziale Kompetenz" }, series: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"(label: "Gut", data: {76, 34, 69, 12}), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"(label: "Mittel", data: {13, 70, 14, 30}), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_chartSeries"(label: "Schlecht", data: {3, 12, 6, 30}), }, yAxisTitle: "Führung", stacking: "NORMAL", colorScheme: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_colorSchemeCustom"( colors: { "#59C968", "#41934B", "#117D20", "#0A4A13" } ), height: if( #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_isPageWidth"( { "PHONE", "TABLET_PORTRAIT", "TABLET_LANDSCAPE", "DESKTOP_NARROW" } ), "SHORT", "MEDIUM" ) ) }, height: "AUTO", style: "NONE", marginBelow: "STANDARD", showBorder: false, showShadow: true, shape: "ROUNDED" ) } ) } ) }, stackWhen: { "PHONE", "TABLET_PORTRAIT" } ), }, backgroundColor: "TRANSPARENT" )
